tasks.title: TS-H1.1a Define /pipeline/run validation contract (request/response + error codes)
tasks.description:
Produce explicit contract for POST /api/presentation-studio/decks/{deckId}/pipeline/run including required fields, allowed stages/scope, and deterministic 4xx error model.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Request schema documented with required/optional fields and enums.
- Response schema includes runId, status, timestamps, and echo of validated scope/stages.
- Error matrix covers invalid deckId, invalid scope, invalid stages, duplicate stage names, and malformed payload.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Completed contract artifact: mission-control/review-packets/RP-0020-pipeline-run-validation-contract.md

tasks.title: TS-H1.1b Implement runId + run-record persistence helper
tasks.description:
Add helper for creating pipeline run records with deterministic shape and persistence target.
Acceptance Criteria:
- runId generation format defined and implemented.
- Persisted record contains deckId, scope, stages, status=started, createdAt/updatedAt.
- Helper is unit-testable or smoke-verified with fixture write/read.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented runId + run-record persistence helper, payload normalization, and pipeline run store bootstrap. RP-0021 attached.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c Wire POST /pipeline/run endpoint + smoke verification
tasks.description:
Implement endpoint using validation + persistence helper and verify with smoke calls.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Valid request returns 201 with runId and started status.
- Invalid request returns 400 with actionable error payload.
- Audit event emitted for pipeline.run.created with runId/deckId metadata.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Wired POST /pipeline/run endpoint and audit event; pending authenticated HTTP smoke (201 + 400 paths) before Ready for Review.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c.1 Add reusable authenticated smoke harness script for /pipeline/run

Acceptance Criteria:
- Script accepts BASE_URL/COOKIE/DECK_ID env vars.
- Valid request path asserts HTTP 201 and prints response body.
- Invalid request path asserts HTTP 400 and prints response body.

tasks.title: TS-B2.2a Decompose slide mutation API contract + payload shapes
tasks.description:
Define atomic create/update/delete contract for SlideSpec v2 mutation endpoints with deterministic validation and audit expectations.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Request/response payload schema documented for POST/PATCH/DELETE.
- Ordering behavior defined (append, position, insertAfter).
- Error model defined (400/404/409).

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposition gate executed for TASK-0024; mutation contract and dependency sequence finalized before coding.

tasks.title: TS-B2.2b Implement POST/PATCH /presentation-studio/decks/:deckId/slides
tasks.description:
Implement create and update mutation endpoints for slide specs with legacy field compatibility, slot normalization fallback, and deck slideOrder maintenance.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST returns 201 with created slide payload and updated count.
- PATCH updates mutable fields and returns updated slide.
- Both endpoints emit audit events and persist store updates.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented POST/PATCH slide mutation endpoints in admin-server/src/server.js with persistence + audit events.

tasks.title: TS-B2.2c Implement DELETE /presentation-studio/decks/:deckId/slides/:slideId + smoke checks
tasks.description:
Implement delete mutation endpoint and verify syntax/smoke for mutation slice.
Acceptance Criteria:
- DELETE removes slide and compacts deck slideOrder.
- Returns deleted slideId + remaining count.
- Basic implementation smoke check recorded (node --check).

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented DELETE endpoint and completed syntax smoke check via `node --check admin-server/src/server.js`.

- At least one unblock child executed in this sweep.
- Recovery packet includes stalled list and Isaac decision gate.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c.2b.i Prepare pipeline-run evidence scaffold + capture template
tasks.description:
Create evidence directory structure and a deterministic capture template so credentialed run output can be attached with minimal operator time.
Acceptance Criteria:
- mission-control/evidence/pipeline-run/ exists with usage notes.
- Evidence template includes 201 and 400 result slots, command, timestamp, and operator signature fields.
- Paths align with TASK-0103 acceptance criteria.

comments.text: Created evidence scaffold and capture template for authenticated smoke outputs.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c.2b.ii Execute credentialed smoke and populate evidence template
tasks.description:
Run authenticated smoke with valid session cookie and record results in prepared template under mission-control/evidence/pipeline-run/.
Acceptance Criteria:
- 201 valid response recorded with runId and started status.
- 400 invalid response recorded with deterministic error payload.
- Completed evidence artifact path referenced in TASK-0097/TASK-0103 comments.

tasks.title: BRS-2026-03-07b.i Build tranche-C decision capture ledger
tasks.description:
Prepare a structured decision ledger for tranche-C items so Isaac approvals/defers can be captured rapidly and replayed into board transitions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Ledger lists tranche-C tasks with decision/status fields.
- Includes approve/defer/hold options + rationale slot.
- Includes transition action column for immediate board updates.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Created tranche-C decision ledger template with decision and transition fields.

tasks.title: BRS-2026-03-07b.ii Apply tranche-C decisions to board transitions
tasks.description:
After Isaac decisions are entered in the ledger, apply status transitions/comments in BOARD.json and note deferred follow-up dates.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All decided items updated in board with audit comments.
- No items moved to Done without approved RP.
- Deferred items include blocker reason and next-check date.

tasks.title: BRS-2026-03-07b.iii Precompute tranche-C board transition plan
tasks.description:
Create a decision-independent transition plan mapping each tranche-C item to exact BOARD.json update actions (approve/defer/hold paths) so TASK-0113 can execute in <30 minutes after Isaac decisions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Transition plan includes per-task action matrix for approve/defer/hold.
- Each row includes target status, required comment template, and follow-up date rule.
- Plan references current board status snapshot timestamp.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Created tranche-c transition plan with approve/defer/hold action matrix and comment templates.

- Unknown templateId returns deterministic 404 payload.
